user.title: Tesla Solar Charger
user.description: Configure your Tesla Solar Charger integration.

data_description.production_sensor: Sensor measuring solar production in W or kW
data_description.consumption_sensors: One or more sensors measuring home consumption in W or kW
data_description.consumption_excludes_charging: Enable only if your consumption sensor does NOT include the EV charging circuit. Most installations do not need this.
data_description.amps_number: The ESPHome BLE proxy's charging amps number entity
data_description.charging_switch: The ESPHome BLE proxy's charging switch entity
data_description.charging_state_sensor: The IEC 61851 state sensor from the BLE proxy
data_description.voltage: Your grid voltage (typically 230V for EU, 120V for US)

error.invalid_power_unit: Sensor must have unit_of_measurement of W or kW
error.no_consumption_sensors: At least one consumption sensor is required

init.title: Tesla Solar Charger Options
init.description: Adjust your Tesla Solar Charger settings.

data_description.update_interval_seconds: How often to update and adjust charging (10-300 seconds)
data_description.margin_w: Buffer to add/subtract from excess calculation (-5000 to 5000 W)
data_description.min_solar_generation_w: Minimum solar generation before starting charge (0-10000 W)
data_description.stop_delay_seconds: Time to wait before stopping charge (to handle cloud cover)
data_description.restart_delay_seconds: Cooldown time after stopping before restarting charge
